case_title: JACKIELYN HORTON VS. JOSEPHINE HUNT et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE AND REQUEST TO RESET TRIAL DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HORTON, JACKIELYN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-09-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-09-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM H. LARRY ELAM. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED ONLY. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY HORTON, JACKIELYN AS TO DEFENDANT HUNT, JOSEPHINE LARKIN, DANIELLE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO MAY-09-2008 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-25-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LARKIN, DANIELLE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-08-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HUNT, JOSEPHINE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2008 - JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT AGAINST JOSEPHINE HUNT ONLY.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HORTON, JACKIELYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUNT, JOSEPHINE $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $33.33 INTEREST, $149.25 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $682.58, SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2008 - JUDGMENT. JUDGMENT AGAINST JOSEPHINE HUNT ONLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
